title: Savory Peruvian Burrata Skewers
description: A garlicky and springy Peruvian dish featuring burrata, perfect for meal prep and served in a fondue pot. This recipe is FODMAP friendly and brine wet.

ingredients.name: burrata cheese
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the fondue pot to 180 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together garlic, lime juice, olive oil, aji amarillo peppers, salt, and black pepper.
Add the burrata cheese to the bowl and toss to coat with the garlic mixture.
Thread the burrata cheese onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in the fondue pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle the chopped cilantro over the burrata cheese and serve immediately.
Repeat the cooking process for the remaining skewers.
Serve the skewers hot and enjoy.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 3 days.
